title: Pigeon
description: Fast client-side quality of life and performance improvements.
body:
## What is Pigeon?
- Pigeon is a client-sided vanilla+ modpack that aims to enhance vanilla experience using 40+ quality of life and optimizations mods.
## What mods does Pigeon contain?
- Pigeon contains more than 40 mods, these include optimization mods (such as Sodium) and quality of life mods (such as Xaero's Map/Minimap)
## Can it run on low-level PCs?
- Pigeon runs very good on old PCs and supports the latest version of Minecraft with the help of optimization mods.
## Can I play on vanilla servers with Pigeon?
- Yes, Pigeon is fully client-sided, this means that it dosen't need to be installed on the server.
## What versions does it support?
- Pigeon supports versions newer than 1.21.4, the Modpack will be updated in 7-14 days after a new release of Minecraft is released.
